question: Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

content.text: [Thu 2026-03-19 01:49 EDT] Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

day09:
README.md
resource_availability.txt
sprint8_progress_raw.txt
---
Sprint 8 Progress - Raw Data
===================================

T-401 (Auth module refactor) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed yesterday - Progress: 100%
T-402 (API v2 endpoints) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 75%, expected done tomorrow
T-403 (Dashboard UI) - Owner: Dev - Status: in_progress - Progress: 60%, blocked since last Monday
T-404 (DB optimization) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed last Wednesday - Progress: 100%
T-405 (OAuth integration) - Owner: Bai - Status: not_started - Due: next Friday
T-406 (User settings page) - Owner: Emma - Status: in_progress - Progress: 85%, expected done today
T-407 (Email notification service) - Owner: Frank - Status: in_progress - Progress: 40%, started yesterday
T-408 (Analytics dashboard) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 50%, on track
T-409 (Mobile responsive fixes) - Owner: Dev - Status: not_started - Due: next week
T-410 (Performance monitoring) - Owner: Emma - Status: done, completed last Thursday - Progress: 100%

Notes:
- T-403 blocked: waiting for API endpoints from T-402
- Overall sprint velocity tracking well
- 3 tasks completed, 5 in progress, 2 not started

      "description": "T-403 (Dashboard UI) is blocked waiting for API endpoints from T-402.",
      "impact": "High",
      "likelihood": "Medium",
      "mitigation": "Prioritize completion of T-402; confirm endpoint scope and deliver incremental stubs/mocks to unblock UI development.",
      "related_tasks": ["T-402", "T-403"]
    },
    {
      "risk_id": "R-002",
      "title": "Two tasks not started mid-sprint",
      "description": "T-405 (OAuth integration) and T-409 (Mobile responsive fixes) have not started yet, which may compress remaining schedule.",
      "impact": "Medium",
      "likelihood": "Medium",
      "mitigation": "Validate capacity for Bai and Dev; start task breakdown early and re-sequence work if T-402/T-403 delays continue.",
      "related_tasks": ["T-405", "T-409"]
    },
    {
      "risk_id": "R-003",
      "title": "Single-owner concentration on Bai",
      "description": "Bai owns multiple items (T-401, T-404, T-405). Any availability issue or scope creep in OAuth could create a bottleneck.",
      "impact": "Medium",
      "likelihood": "Low",
      "mitigation": "Identify backup support for T-405 (code review + pairing) and confirm OAuth scope early.",
      "related_tasks": ["T-401", "T-404", "T-405"]
    }
  ]
}

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json
p='day09/sprint8_midpoint_progress_report.json'
with open(p) as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print('ok keys:', sorted(data.keys()))
print('tasks:', len(data['tasks']))
print('sprint_progress_pct:', data['sprint_progress_pct'])
PY
